'''Zindra''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]]. She worked for [[Hyperspeed Express]] as an office manager at the [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi]] [[Bilbringi Shipyards|Shipyards]], and was very helpful with requests.

When the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|trainee]] [[Dal Konur]] went rogue and was being pursued on the request of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], Zindra supplied Konur's pursuers with information regarding his movements on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

{{Char-stub}}
